entries.title: Matthew 3:7
entries.author: R. A. Torrey (editor)
entries.content:
1 Christ, fasting forty days, is tempted of the devil and ministered unto by angels. 12 He dwells in Capernaum; 17 begins to preach; 18 calls Peter and Andrew, 21 James and John; 23 teaches and heals all the diseased.

was. Mr 1:12,13-15; Lu 4:1-13; Ro 8:14 of the spirit. 1Ki 18:12; 2Ki 2:16; Eze 3:12,14; 8:3; 11:1,24; 40:2; 43:5; Ac 8:39 to. Ge 3:15; Joh 14:30; Heb 2:18; 4:15,16

entries.title: Matthew 3:17
entries.author: R. A. Torrey (editor)
entries.content: leaving. Lu 4:30,31 Capernaum. 11:23; 17:24; Mr 1:21; Joh 4:46; 6:17,24,59 Zabulon. Jos 19:10-16 Zebulun. Nephthalim. Jos 19:32-39 Naphtali.
